title: Planning a World Cup Watch Party at a Bar? The ‘FIFA Police’ Are Lurking
summary_full: Some businesses advertising watch parties in Canada’s two host cities are wary of running afoul of FIFA’s copyright, which protects advertising “World Cup” events.
summary_public: Some businesses advertising watch parties in Canada’s two host cities are wary of running afoul of FIFA’s copyright, which protects advertising “World Cup” events.
